description: armed conflict in Vietnam, Laos, and Cambodia between North Vietnam and South Vietnam, from 1955 to 1975
description_wiki: The Vietnam War (1 November 1955 – 30 April 1975) was an armed conflict in Vietnam, Laos, and Cambodia fought between North Vietnam (Democratic Republic of Vietnam) and South Vietnam (Republic of Vietnam) and their allies.
Thailand, officially the Kingdom of Thailand, and formerly known as Siam until 1939, is a country located in Mainland Southeast Asia.

description: country located primarily in North America
description_wiki: The United States of America (USA), also known as the United States (U.S.) or America, is a country primarily located in North America.

description: county seat of Fresno County, California, United States
description_wiki: Fresno ( ; Spanish for 'ash tree') is a city in the San Joaquin Valley of California, United States.

description: high school in Saint Paul, Minnesota, USA
description_wiki: Como Park Senior High School (CPSHS or commonly known as CPHS) is a public high school located in the Lake Como area of Saint Paul, Minnesota, United States, serving grades nine through twelve.

description: city in Anoka County, Minnesota, United States
description_wiki: Ham Lake is a city in Anoka County, Minnesota, United States.

description: public school in Andover, Minnesota, United States
description_wiki: Andover High School is a four-year public high school at 2115 Andover Blvd, Andover, Minnesota, United States.
